exploration_notes: Rewrote the observeApiError function in packages/metrics/lib/observeApiError.ts to match all requirements. Changes: (1) Removed unused imports (getApiError, getIsNetworkError, etc.), (2) Removed the third ignoreCodes parameter, (3) Made the function always call metricObserver exactly once — falsy errors get 'failure', status >= 500 gets '5xx', status >= 400 gets '4xx', everything else gets 'failure', (4) Changed to check error.status directly instead of using getApiError(), (5) Updated observeEr
